name: libfilesys-df-perl
title: libfilesys-df-perl
summary: Module to obtain filesystem disk space information
description:
Module to obtain filesystem disk space information
This module provides a way to obtain filesystem disk space
information. This is a Unix only distribution. If you want to gather
this information for Unix and Windows, use Filesys::DfPortable.  The
only major benefit of using Filesys::Df over Filesys::DfPortable, is
that Filesys::Df supports the use of open filehandles as arguments.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libfilesys-df-perl because Module to obtain filesystem disk space information.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libfilesys-df-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libfilesys-df-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libfilesys-df-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
